name: Mini Mini Golf Golf
short_description: Mini Mini Golf Golf is an indie storytelling experience that goes beyond the lanes of the here and now into distant memories of a future planetary collapse. Destabilize the present and plunge into a neon psychohistory of a bizarre entity in distress. This is not a game about minigolf.
detailed_description:
Mini Mini Golf Golf is a sci-fi narrative experience like no other. As you discover tunnels through spacetime and unravel memories of inevitable climate collapse, identity and responsibility collide at the fault line of our planet’s future.

The metaphor of a childhood memory – a perfectly normal round of Minigolf – rips open the fabric of spacetime and connects you with a mysterious and bizarre entity from the future, injecting thoughts and ideas into your trails as you navigate a virtual underworld of memories and resonances.

Climate Fiction

Grind away at tectonic plates and build up tension points, both geological and psychological, as you converse with the mind that perpetually upholds our future climate. Lift their burden for a while and uncover how they will have become the being that they are then. In their future, climate collapse is met with enormous geoengineering projects that create a new equilibrium by re-shaping plate tectonics.

A once-human mind

The psychohistory of the entity you encounter is fragmented, tainted and biased. It is incomplete, more than human, and tired. It finds comfort in your company and in the common memory of simple and safe games of Minigolf. Weave your way through memories of their life, uncovering thoughts and traces about their coming of age on a planetary scale.

Mini Mini Golf Golf is…

  • A unique blend of mystery, sci-fi and experimental storytelling

  • An intriguing connection with a future queer entity

  • A spark of resilience in a dystopian future

Join us on Discord to build these sparks of resilience and community in a future where the equilibrium between the planet and humanity is at stake!
